title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements & Secure Sign-In
summary: Highlight the new AI assistant capabilities and Google authentication integration that streamline problem-solving and secure user access.
core_message: CodeGrind now ships an enhanced Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant and Google authentication integration, improving problem-solving guidance, model-switching during chats, and a streamlined, secure sign-in flow for faster onboarding and a smoother learning experience.
cta: Try the updated AI assistant in a new problem and log in with Google to experience the streamlined onboarding.
visual_brief: A short 30-45s demo video showing: (1) user initiating a LeetCode-style problem, (2) AI assistant providing step-by-step guidance with model-switching, (3) clicking 'Sign in with Google' and a quick profile sync, (4) subtle UI cues of secure OAuth flow and real-time problem-solving tips.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
